League Flex Dashboard

810 matches, 25 players, and 173 champions. Stats are aggregated by real name, not summoner name.

Dashboard Players Champions Combos Matches Teams Showcases Experimental

Overview

Dates are mapped from UTC timestamps into Europe/London. KDA ratio uses (kills + assists) / deaths, with zero deaths counted as one for aggregate ratios.
